channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: A Visual Journey Through the 1939 New York World’s Fair
item.description: The 1939 New York World’s Fair, held in Flushing Meadows, Queens, remains one of the most ambitious events of the 20th century. Celebrating the theme 'The World of Tomorrow,' it showcased futuristic a...

item.title: Airline Industry Faces Potential Struggles Due to Iran War and Fuel Shortages
item.description: Airline industry executives are preparing for potential crises similar to the Spirit Airlines liquidation earlier this year, as geopolitical tensions, particularly the ongoing Iran war, threaten the g...

item.title: Pentagon spokesperson defends escort policy as reporters dispute First Amendment concerns
item.description: Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell responded sharply to the New York Times' second lawsuit against the Department of Defense in five months, arguing that the paper seeks unrestricted access to classified...

item.title: Thibaut Courtois Invests in Spanish Club CD Extremadura Through NXTPLAY
item.description: Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois don waka enter new football business matter as e become co-owner of Spanish club CD Extremadura. The move happen through NXTPLAY, the sports investment platform...

item.title: Alex Eala eliminated from Strasbourg tournament by Oliynykova
item.description: Filipino tennis prodigy Alex Eala was eliminated from the Strasbourg tournament after facing a tough match against Ukrainian player Oliynykova. Despite showing determination and skill on the court, Ea...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi Criticises PM Modi Over Media Interaction During Norway Visit
item.description: Congress leader and Leader of the Opposition Rahul Gandhi criticised Prime Minister Narendra Modi after a video surfaced showing him not responding to a journalist’s question during his visit to Norwa...

item.title: Philadelphia Eagles Wide Receiver A.J. Brown Marries Kelsey Riley at Luxury Laguna Beach Ceremony
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles wide receiver A.J. Brown celebrated his wedding to Kelsey Riley on May 16, 2026, at the Montage Laguna Beach resort in California. The ceremony, which took place at 5 PM overlookin...

item.title: Philippine Coast Guard investigates Chinese vessels in Pag-asa Island waters
item.description: The Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) has rejected China's claim that its monitoring activities in the West Philippine Sea are mere 'publicity stunts.' Rear Admiral Jay Tarriela, PCG spokesperson for the a...

item.title: Matatu Owners Maintain Strike as Talks on Diesel Prices Stall
item.description: Nairobi: Matatu owners and the government have not yet agreed on the diesel pricing, leaving the ongoing strike in place. During a press briefing on Monday evening, the Energy Cabinet Secretary Opiyo ...

item.title: Two people killed in road accident involving trailer and car in Jos South
item.description: On Monday morning, tragedy struck Kwang community, Jos South Local Government Area, Plateau State, as two people lost their lives in a road accident involving a trailer and a Toyota Corolla. The crash...

item.title: RBA Chief Economist Sarah Hunter to Discuss Economic Outlook Following Federal Budget
item.description: Investors and economists are keeping a close eye on the Reserve Bank of Australia as Chief Economist Sarah Hunter prepares to deliver her first speech since the Federal Budget. Speaking at the Bloombe...

item.title: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth campaigns for Trump-backed candidate in Kentucky primary
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth temporarily set aside his responsibilities related to the war in Iran to campaign in Kentucky's 4th Congressional District primary. He attended an event in Hebron suppor...

item.title: Stella and Vincent's Plan to Persuade Matthew in Episode 44 of The Alibi
item.description: In Episode 44 of the popular Filipino TV drama 'The Alibi,' Stella Morales and Vincent Cabrera take bold steps to convince their friend Matthew to agree with their plan. The episode shows Stella and V...

item.title: Arsenal edges closer to first Premier League title since 2004
item.description: Arsenal don put demself very close to ending their 22-year wait for the Premier League trophy after dem manage to beat Burnley 1-0 on Monday night. Kai Havertz score the only goal from Bukayo Saka cor...

item.title: Canada maintains unbeaten streak with 5-1 win over Denmark at Ice Hockey World Championship
item.description: Canada secured a decisive 5-1 victory over Denmark in Fribourg, Switzerland, to maintain a perfect record at the Ice Hockey World Championship. The win marked Canada's third consecutive triumph, with ...

item.title: Protests held in Senate calling for Sara Duterte’s impeachment and Dela Rosa’s arrest
item.description: On May 18, 2026, several groups gathered outside the Senate building in Pasay City to express their concerns on national political issues. Protesters called for the impeachment of Vice President Sara ...

item.title: Former Abu Sayyaf Members and Families in Sulu Join Technology-Enabled Education Program for Reintegration
item.description: In Sulu province, once a known stronghold of the Abu Sayyaf Group, at least 80 former members of the terrorist organization, including some former violent extremists, along with their relatives, are n...

item.title: Indian Rupee Hits Record Low of 96.3 Amid Rising Oil Prices and West Asia Conflict
item.description: The Indian rupee fell to a record low of 96.3 against the US dollar on Monday, continuing a downward trend for the fifth consecutive trading session. The depreciation was driven by elevated global oil...

item.title: International Museum Day Celebrations Highlight Role of Museums in Education and Heritage Preservation
item.description: On the occasion of International Museum Day, the Baudhasree Archaeological Museum in Guntur witnessed an event focusing on the critical role museums play in preserving cultural heritage and educating ...

item.title: UK Court Hears Bribery Case Against Former Nigerian Oil Minister Diezani Alison-Madueke
item.description: The UK court don dey handle serious matter as former Nigerian Petroleum Minister, Diezani Alison-Madueke, dey face charges of accepting bribes and conspiracy to commit bribery. The trial wey happen fo...
